articleTitle: Inverse Time and Space Roller Coaster
introSection: Inverse Time and Space Roller Coaster (Simplified Chinese: 反转时空过山车) is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster located at Silk Road Paradise in Qindu, Xianyang, Shaanxi, China.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders sit back-to-back in rows of two on either side of the track.

fullText:
Inverse Time and Space Roller Coaster (Simplified Chinese: 反转时空过山车) is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster located at Silk Road Paradise in Qindu, Xianyang, Shaanxi, China.



Riders sit back-to-back in rows of two on either side of the track.
